_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing operational environment analysis
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Skill OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.508), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.637). Shared vocabulary: [operational, skill]. NICE-only terms [analysis, environment, performing] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.921, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.060 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in performing operational environment analysis" and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.602 ≈ STS 0.637 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [operational, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [operational, skill]. NICE-only: [analysis, environment, performing]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].
